expectations.text: Maintains consistent terminology across paragraphs (e.g., 'climate change' used consistently)
expectations.evidence: Uses 'climate change' consistently in both paragraphs; consistent vocabulary level throughout
Paragraph 1 introduces the problem, paragraph 2 discusses specific impacts; logical connection maintained
Uses 'Among the various systems affected', 'as a consequence of', 'by modifying' for smooth transitions

expectations.text: No more than 5 consecutive words match the original in either paragraph
expectations.evidence: Maximum 4 consecutive words match in either paragraph
Uses hydrological cycle, climatic perturbations, precipitation patterns, geographical regions
